MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JAMES MILLS, ESQ., 510.521.8748, FOR PLAINTIFF BENEDICT ALLEN.
REBECCA BENHURI, ESQ., 415.394.9400, FOR DEFENDANTS TWO'S COMPANY INC., THOMAS ZIMMERMAN AND ROBIN WEISS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS TWO'S COMPANY INC., THOMAS ZIMMERMAN AND ROBIN WEISS' MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Granted. Pursuant to CCP 436(b), paragraphs 8, 10, 13, 14, 15, 16, 17, 18, 19, and 24-65 are stricken from Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint because they fail to conform with Judge Kramer's Order Granting Plaintiff's Motion to File First Amended Complaint, filed May 2, 2013. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

REBECCA BENHURI, ESQ., 415.394.9400, FOR DEFENDANTS TWO'S COMPANY INC., THOMAS ZIMMERMAN AND ROBIN WEISS.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTS TWO'S COMPANY INC., THOMAS ZIMMERMAN AND ROBIN WEISS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is off calendar as moot in light of the Court's ruling on Defendants' motion to strike.
